series_metadata.series_description: This file consists of the findings prepared by a compliance auditor when auditing a holder for unclaimed funds. The file consists of the total amount of unclaimed funds owed by the holder and the names, addresses and other information regarding the accounts.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: hard copy of Audit Work Paper Files in operating area . Once paper is scanned and electronic images checked accuracy and completeness, paper. ; Electronic: Keep scanned images 10 years
